en.name: VPO-209 "Paradox Unleashed"
en.description: A civilian VPO-209 built around loopholes, paperwork, and .366 TKM — exactly the kind of thing Tony enjoys ruining. He stripped out the polite hunting-rifle behavior, reworked the fire-control group, opened the gas system, and forced the old AKM bones underneath to run full-auto. The result is not elegant. It kicks hard, barks loud, and throws .366 downrange like it is angry at the law that created it. Tony calls it Paradox Unleashed: a legal compromise turned into an illegal answer.
